title: Jingunamani Lyrics Jilla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Jingunamani
Singers(s): K.G. Ranjith, Sunidhi Chauhan
Lyrics:Viveka
Movie: Jilla
Music : D Imman

Jingunamani Jingunamani
sririchi putta nenjula aani.
hey vengala kinni vengala kinni
pola minnum mandhira meni.

Naan vetakthukku pakkathula pogaadhava
Ore noole illaa sela katta aalaanava
ada nee vandha en bandha gaali..
amaango... amaango..
amaango .. amaango ..

Ye Jingunamani Jingunamani
sririchi putta nenjula aani.
hey vengala kinni vengala kinni
pola minnum mandhira meni.

Idhu enna odambaa
veda kozhi kuzhambaa
puriyaama naan paakkuren.

Samanchadhu illa samanjadhu thaanda
unnakaaga ela poduren.

Richter vachi paarthaa
nee paththu earth quake-u
ottumoththam udalaagudhey.

Vetti vachu ponaa
oru water melon cake-u
pakkam vandha kulir aagumey
get together venum namma kettupoga
amaango... amaango..
amaango .. amaango ..

Jingunamani Jingunamani
sririchi putta nenjula aani.
hey vengala kinni vengala kinni
pola minnum mandhira meni.

Nee vetakthukku pakkathula pogaadhava
Ore noole illaa sela katta aalaanava
nee vandha en bandha gaali..
amaango... amaango..
amaango .. amaango ..
amaango..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Jingunamani?

The song is an energetic dance number that celebrates joy and festivity.

Who are the singers of Jingunamani?

The song is sung by K.G. Ranjith and Sunidhi Chauhan.

Who composed the music for Jilla?

The music for Jilla was composed by D Imman.

What is the release year of the movie Jilla?

The movie Jilla was released in 2013.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song adds a lively and celebratory atmosphere to the film, enhancing its festive scenes.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Jilla, Jingunamani is a vibrant and energetic song that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Sung by K.G. Ranjith and Sunidhi Chauhan, the track is composed by D Imman with lyrics by Viveka. The song is set against a backdrop of festivity, making it a perfect fit for party and dance sequences. It conveys a sense of happiness and excitement, encouraging listeners to join in the fun and revelry.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Jingunamani from the movie Jilla, a high-energy track that brings together the dynamic vocals of K.G. Ranjith and Sunidhi Chauhan. With D Imman's vibrant music and Viveka's catchy lyrics, this song is a perfect blend of rhythm and excitement. Experience the electrifying beats that make every moment a celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Jingunamani, jingunamani, a nail pierced my heart. Hey, like a bronze bell, your magical body shines.
Don't go near the fire. You can't tie a sari without a thread. When you come, my troubles disappear. Amaango... amaango...
Jingunamani, jingunamani, a nail pierced my heart. Hey, like a bronze bell, your magical body shines.
What is this body? Like a spicy chicken curry, I can't understand it.
Nothing is balanced, nothing is right. For you, I will give everything.
If you check with a Richter scale, you are like an earthquake, shaking my whole body.
If you cut it, a watermelon cake. When you come close, it cools down. We need to get together and have fun. Amaango... amaango...
Jingunamani, jingunamani, a nail pierced my heart. Hey, like a bronze bell, your magical body shines.
Don't go near the fire. You can't tie a sari without a thread. When you come, my troubles disappear. Amaango... amaango...
